#  Edit a Change Event (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To edit any change event_ , 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Change Events tool.   
OR
    * _To edit only the change events you created_ , 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Change Events tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the change event you want to edit.
  3. Tap **Edit**.  
![Edit Change Event Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6d01a6461279f0c82c17d7dd38c53c9e/fa218a1a0c0a23d366e41df0f4b353e3/edit-change-event-android.png?fm=webp)
  4. Tap into a field to edit any relevant information.  
To learn about each field, see [Create a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event).
  5. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Change Events (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-android/permissions)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
title: Edit a Change Event (Android)
description: How to edit a change event using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
